name: Quality Issues for Record
description: Embedded panel datalist — shows active issues for the current record. Filter by recordId via embedded-datalist hash variable.

properties.sql: SELECT id, c_severity AS severity, c_tabcode AS tab, c_rulecode AS rule_code, c_message AS message, c_dateraised AS date_raised FROM app_fd_qa_issue WHERE c_isactive = 'Y' AND ('#requestParam.recordId#' = '' OR c_recordid = '#requestParam.recordId#') ORDER BY CASE c_severity WHEN 'ERROR' THEN 1 WHEN 'WARNING' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, c_tabcode, c_rulecode
properties.countSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_fd_qa_issue WHERE c_isactive = 'Y' AND ('#requestParam.recordId#' = '' OR c_recordid = '#requestParam.recordId#')
